**KEY DECISIONS:**

**REJECTED AVGO:** Despite appearing in all 4 portfolios, CRO's analysis convinced me this is peak AI cycle groupthink. When everyone owns the "safe" AI play, it becomes unsafe.

**EMPHASIZED REAL ASSETS:** CVX + GLD (27%) provides stagflation protection while maintaining quality characteristics.

**BALANCED CONVICTION WITH PRUDENCE:** Higher cash allocation (30%) reflects macro uncertainty while maintaining exposure to highest-conviction ideas that survived CRO scrutiny.

**DIVERSIFIED CORRELATION RISK:** Avoided over-concentration in any single theme while capturing multiple structural trends (energy transition hedge, healthcare demographics, private capital deployment).
